title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy, Big Mom as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we let her destroy any more of the ship, I'd never be able to face luffy and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't let the ship slow! We can't let Perospero and the others

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: unfor- sunsetly, big mom will be on her feet again very soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I know. I've just the thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That way I'll definitely find it! The wedding cake()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now it got longer! If she swings that around,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This ship will really be done for!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we're in better shape than we were just a moment ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Like I'd fall for that again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You can't fool me, you tempt-ress!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... I don't have any flesh, lighting doesn't do a thing to me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to fight me, soul king?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Couldn't even put a scratch on me!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
